No response required


Huntingdon/Station 2 South Capacity for March 1 - 16, 2026


Notice Text:

Emergent integrity work has been identified in 2L1 that requires winter access to complete targeted excavations and pipe inspections. This work is planned to start March 3rd and expected to be complete by March 16th. Updates or changes will be communicated as they become available.

Westcoast will be allowing the following flow on T South:

Huntingdon Delivery Area Capacity

March 1 - 2, 2026: 2,152,916 GJ
March 3 - 16, 2026: 2,040,000 GJ

Station 2 South Capacity

March 1 - 2, 2026: 2,209,572 GJ
March 3 - 16, 2026: 1,982,949 GJ

The constraint is below Firm Contracted Capacity. Shippers can access the Constrained Locations Firm Shipper Share Report for more detailed information (Nominations>Scheduled Quantity>Constrained Locations Firm Shipper Share).

Changes in operating conditions may result in the capacity being recalled on any gas cycle.

If you have any questions, please contact the CSR hotline at (403) 699-1800.


BackPrint
